_README: Manual seed for Estimated BTO Resale Availability. Each entry is a BTO project (or estate-level group) with a KNOWN or best-estimate completion / key-collection date. The compute step (app.data.bto_mop) applies MOP policy on top of these to derive the estimated resale-eligible date. Edit this file when HDB publishes new completion/key-collection dates. See docs/BTO_MOP_ESTIMATION_RULES.md for the rules a human or AI agent must follow before adding/editing rows. Entries here OVERRIDE anything derived automatically from launch data for the same (project_name, town, flat_classification).

_schema.flat_classification: STANDARD | PLUS | PRIME | PLH | UNCLASSIFIED | UNKNOWN
_schema.estimated_completion_date: 'YYYY-MM' or 'YYYY-MM-DD' or 'YYYY' (year-only lowers confidence to MEDIUM)
_schema.estimated_key_collection_date: same format as completion; if present and has a month -> confidence HIGH
_schema.confidence: optional explicit override: HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW
